feed.title: Muhammad Adel
feed.subtitle: A minimal, portfolio, sidebar, bootstrap Jekyll theme with responsive web design and focuses on text presentation.

entry.title: Hackerone Android Challenges Writeups
entry.summary: Peace be upon all of you, on this writeup I am going to cover the solutions of all android challenges on Hackerone (Thermostat - Intentional Exercise - Oauthbreaker - Webdev). Difficulty: Easy and moderate Challenge Link: https://ctf.hacker101.com/ctf Thermostat Let’s start by downloading the provided APK. and then install it in our emulator I am using Android Studio with Nexus 5 API 29. ope...

entry.title: Unrestricted File Upload Leads to SSRF and RCE

link.title: Unrestricted File Upload Leads to SSRF and RCE

entry.summary: Introduction Peace be upon you all, I am going to share with you a vulnerability that I have found almost a year ago and it is remarkable for me because it was the first critical one for me anyway let’s jump in. ImageMagick It is a package commonly used by web services to process images. A number of image processing plugins depend on the ImageMagick library, including, but not limited to, PHP’...

entry.title: I owe your Request | HTTP Request Smuggling leads to Full Accounts takeover

link.title: I owe your Request | HTTP Request Smuggling leads to Full Accounts takeover

entry.summary: Introduction Peace be upon you all, this is actually my first writeup which going to be about a very interesting vulnerability, HTTP Request Smuggling, which I found in a private program which I was able to escalate it Full account takeover. I am going to share with you how to search for this vulnerability in a large scale and what the best tool and resource to utilize when testing for this vul...

entry.title: Cybertalents Space Web Challenge Writeup
entry.summary: Description you might need some space XD. Difficulty: Hard Challenge Link: http://3.126.138.80/catch/http://ec2-35-158-236-11.eu-central-1.compute.amazonaws.com/space/ Solution Exploring Opening the challenge we will stumble upon an almost empty web page with only one word “HI!”. There is nothing on the source page. So I thinks we should do some directory brute force. As we see in t...

entry.title: Cybertalents catchMomen Web Challenge Writeup
entry.summary: Description Don’t Try To 3scape From Your Destiny ! Difficulty: Medium Challenge Link: http://3.126.138.80/catch/ Solution Exploring It seems like a normal website for a company. there is only one interesting login function which maybe will be our attack vector. while looking through the source code I found a credential which maybe will allow me to login but unfortunately it is not wo...
